AuthorityType.description: Source of legal authority for the moratorium (U2).
AuthorityType.title: AuthorityType

CommonClauses.description: Presence of common but variable clauses (Tier 2: C2-C12).

has_conflict_repeal.description: Language overriding conflicting existing code provisions
has_conflict_repeal.title: Has Conflict Repeal

has_open_meetings_compliance.description: Explicit open meetings law compliance statement
has_open_meetings_compliance.title: Has Open Meetings Compliance

has_tolling.description: Suspends statutory deadlines for permit processing
has_tolling.title: Has Tolling

has_waiver_provision.description: Board discretion to grant case-by-case exceptions
has_waiver_provision.title: Has Waiver Provision

has_appeal_process.description: Formal appeal mechanism with enumerated criteria
has_appeal_process.title: Has Appeal Process

has_no_vested_rights.description: Explicit statement that moratorium creates no entitlement
has_no_vested_rights.title: Has No Vested Rights

has_pending_application_coverage.description: Moratorium applies to already-submitted but unresolved applications
has_pending_application_coverage.title: Has Pending Application Coverage

CommonClauses.title: CommonClauses

DefinitionApproach.description: How the moratorium defines the regulated use (Tier 4).
DefinitionApproach.title: DefinitionApproach

DefinitionExtract.description: Extracted definition of the regulated use.

text.description: Verbatim definition text from the ordinance (up to 500 chars)
text.title: Text

size_threshold.description: Size threshold if applicable, e.g. '5,000 sq ft' or '2 MW'
size_threshold.title: Size Threshold

includes_crypto.description: True if definition explicitly includes cryptocurrency mining
includes_crypto.title: Includes Crypto

includes_ai.description: True if definition explicitly mentions AI computing or artificial intelligence
includes_ai.title: Includes Ai

DefinitionExtract.title: DefinitionExtract

DetailLevel.description: Quality/detail level for findings or work plan.
DetailLevel.title: DetailLevel

adoption_date.description: Date the moratorium was adopted (ISO format YYYY-MM-DD if possible)
adoption_date.title: Adoption Date

effective_date.description: Date the moratorium takes effect (ISO format)
effective_date.title: Effective Date

has_early_termination.description: Moratorium ends automatically when new regulations adopted
has_early_termination.title: Has Early Termination

early_termination_text.description: Early termination language if present (up to 200 chars)
early_termination_text.title: Early Termination Text

DurationType.description: How the moratorium's duration is specified (U6).
DurationType.title: DurationType

has_exemptions.description: True if any exemptions or grandfathering provisions exist
has_exemptions.title: Has Exemptions

key_text.description: Most significant exemption language verbatim (up to 300 chars)
key_text.title: Key Text

has_regulatory_gap.description: Finding that existing code does not define or regulate the use
has_regulatory_gap.title: Has Regulatory Gap

has_police_power.description: Invocation of health, safety, and welfare standard
has_police_power.title: Has Police Power

has_impact_enumeration.description: Specific impacts enumerated beyond generic health/safety language
has_impact_enumeration.title: Has Impact Enumeration

impacts.description: Specific impact categories mentioned in findings
impacts.title: Impacts

has_study_intent.description: Statement of intent to study the issue and develop regulations
has_study_intent.title: Has Study Intent

has_emergency.description: Finding of emergency, urgency, or immediate threat
has_emergency.title: Has Emergency

has_prior_action_ref.description: Reference to a prior moratorium (indicates this is an extension)
has_prior_action_ref.title: Has Prior Action Ref

detail_level.description: Overall quality of findings: minimal (1-2 generic WHEREASes), moderate (3-5 with some specificity), detailed (6+ with data/citations)

key_concerns_text.description: Most specific concern language from findings (up to 300 chars)
key_concerns_text.title: Key Concerns Text

InstrumentForm.description: Legal form of the moratorium instrument (Tier 5).
InstrumentForm.title: InstrumentForm

geographic_detail.description: Specific zones, districts, or areas if not jurisdiction-wide
geographic_detail.title: Geographic Detail

key_text.description: Core operative language verbatim (up to 300 chars)
key_text.title: Key Text

Sector.description: Infrastructure sector targeted by the moratorium.
Sector.title: Sector

has_noise_generator_provisions.description: Noise limits, generator testing restrictions, dBA standards
has_noise_generator_provisions.title: Has Noise Generator Provisions

has_water_assessment.description: Water consumption study or impact assessment required
has_water_assessment.title: Has Water Assessment

has_grid_assessment.description: Electrical grid capacity or demand assessment required
has_grid_assessment.title: Has Grid Assessment

has_property_value_guarantee.description: Developer required to guarantee or mitigate property value impacts
has_property_value_guarantee.title: Has Property Value Guarantee

has_incentive_guardrails.description: Conditions on economic development incentives (workforce, renewable, PILOT)
has_incentive_guardrails.title: Has Incentive Guardrails

has_fire_safety.description: NFPA 855 or fire safety compliance provisions
has_fire_safety.title: Has Fire Safety

has_hazmat_training.description: Emergency response or hazmat training requirements
has_hazmat_training.title: Has Hazmat Training

has_safety_incident_trigger.description: Explicit reference to a safety incident as moratorium trigger
has_safety_incident_trigger.title: Has Safety Incident Trigger

has_farmland_preservation.description: Agricultural land preservation requirements or ratios
has_farmland_preservation.title: Has Farmland Preservation

has_physical_hazard_assessment.description: Shadow flicker, blade throw, or ice throw analysis
has_physical_hazard_assessment.title: Has Physical Hazard Assessment

has_work_plan.description: True if a study process or work plan is described
has_work_plan.title: Has Work Plan

detail_level.description: absent = no mention; minimal = general intent; moderate = departments/topics identified; detailed = phased schedule with milestones

assigned_departments.description: Departments or bodies assigned to conduct the study
assigned_departments.title: Assigned Departments

key_text.description: Most specific work plan language (up to 300 chars)
key_text.title: Key Text

SuspendedApprovalType.description: Types of government approvals suspended by the moratorium (U5a).
SuspendedApprovalType.title: SuspendedApprovalType

description:
Complete structured extraction from a moratorium document.

Maps to the Moratorium Clause Taxonomy (Tiers 1-5).
See research/synthesis/moratorium-clause-taxonomy.md for full documentation.

jurisdiction.description: Full jurisdiction name, e.g. 'DeKalb County, GA' or 'Village of Godfrey, IL'
jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction

adopting_body.description: Name of the adopting body, e.g. 'Board of Commissioners' or 'City Council'
adopting_body.title: Adopting Body

sectors.description: Infrastructure sectors covered by this moratorium
sectors.title: Sectors

is_extension.description: True if this document extends a previously adopted moratorium
is_extension.title: Is Extension

authority_citation.description: Specific statutory or constitutional citation, e.g. 'N.C.G.S. 160D-107'
authority_citation.title: Authority Citation

definition.description: Definition of the regulated use (U4 / Tier 4)

vote_result.description: Vote tally if stated, e.g. '7-0', '4-1 (Jones dissenting)', 'unanimous'
vote_result.title: Vote Result

public_hearing_held.description: Whether a public hearing was held before adoption (True/False/None if unknown)
public_hearing_held.title: Public Hearing Held

confidence.description: Confidence in extraction accuracy (0.0 = poor text/guessing, 1.0 = clear full text)
confidence.title: Confidence

summary.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the moratorium: who adopted it, what it covers, key features
summary.title: Summary

notes.description: Any notable features, unusual provisions, or extraction caveats
notes.title: Notes

title: MoratoriumExtraction
